description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Review spec M1 (owner: spec defect). specled.spec_review.coverage_tab_bind_closure fuses ~8 independently-testable contracts (closure-line format, per-test-only 'Reached by tests' row, observed/approximate qualifier, file-level-proxy note, rollup badge, generated_at staleness, five degraded banners, no_tracer_manifest banner) verified via whole-file command tests — a regression in one clause can ship green at requirement granularity. Split into per-contract requirement ids with their own covering scenarios/tests.
title: Split over-compound spec_review.coverage_tab_bind_closure requirement
